F0800S Staff Assessment: Time Outdoors Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers spending time outdoors. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
216 F0800T_STF_RLGN_CD F0800T_STF_RLGN_CD F0800T Staff Assessment: Participating in Religious Activities Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers participating in religious activities or practices. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not
